name: Brown, Edna Olive
description: Hails direct from the old seaport town, and to this fact we accredit her fondness for fish. However it may be, we know that she has a great appetite for pike. Is a demure little miss, but we venture to say—, well to cut it short Miss Brown has kept voluminous records of the class doings ever since September, 1905. We all wish her well.

name: Campbell, William Smith
description: During his Freshman year used to arise sometime during the early morning hours, and extract nourishment from the sleeping kine. It was right here that got his start, and no one has ever seen him awake since. He hopes to explode a theory whereby students will find it beneficial to plug all night, and sleep all day. For three years has held the Valentine Smith scholarship, and on the strength of this, he hopes when he graduates to play the role of "The Sleeping Beauty" in "Babes in the Woods."

name: Webster, Carl Chase
description: Three years ago one bright September morning, stood on the station platform at "Tylers," where he was accosted by a gentleman who wished to know where he might be going. replied, "I am hitting it for Durham." This was the start of the Chase, "that is," as far as we know. After graduation we expect him to be directly or indirectly connected with some insane asylum. Yes? No?

name: Doe, Marion
motto: Nature never did store her jewels in garrets four stories high.
description: "Marion" has the distinction of being the smallest individual in the class, but this has not kept her from taking an able part in all class stunts. For three years "Marion" has guarded all the ready money of the class.

name: Ellsworth, Perry Foss
description: In his boyhood days "Perry" acquired a great liking for "juice"—we mean the "juice" that runs along wires and can't be bottled up. I suppose this accounts for "Perry" being with us. We admire his courage. "Perry" has found spare time enough to toot in the band and orchestra for three years.
